input.description: List existing scripts in local bin

input.command: ls -d ~/work ~/personal ~/projects 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; ls ~/work 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo "---"; ls ~/personal 2>/dev/null | head -10
ls -d ~/repos/azure/*/ 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo "==="; ls -d ~/repos/github/*/ 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo "==="; ls -d ~/repos/google/*/ 2>/dev/null | head -10

input.old_string:
#!/usr/bin/env bash

if [[ $# -eq 1 ]]; then
    selected=$1
else
    items=`find ~/work -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d`
    items+=`find ~/personal -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d`
    items+=("$HOME/personal")
    items+=("$HOME/work")
    items+=("$HOME/.dotfiles")
    selected=`echo "$items" | fzf`
fi

tmux_session_name=`basename $selected | tr . _`

tmux switch-client -t $tmux_session_name
if [[ $? -eq 0 ]]; then
    exit 0
fi

tmux new-session -c $selected -d -s $tmux_session_name && tmux switch-client -t $tmux_session_name || tmux new -c $selected -A -s $tmux_session_name
input.new_string:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# tmux-sessionizer — ThePrimeagen-style project session picker
# Scans project directories and creates/switches to named tmux sessions

if [[ $# -eq 1 ]]; then
    selected=$1
else
    selected=$(find \
        ~/repos/azure \
        ~/repos/github \
        ~/repos/gitlab \
        ~/repos/google \
        -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | \
        sort | \
        fzf --reverse --header "Pick a project" \
            --preview 'ls -la {} | head -20' \
            --bind 'ctrl-d:preview-half-page-down,ctrl-u:preview-half-page-up')
fi

if [[ -z $selected ]]; then
    exit 0
fi

selected_name=$(basename "$selected" | tr . _)
tmux_running=$(pgrep tmux)

if [[ -z $TMUX ]] && [[ -z $tmux_running ]]; then
    tmux new-session -s "$selected_name" -c "$selected"
    exit 0
fi

if ! tmux has-session -t="$selected_name" 2>/dev/null; then
    tmux new-session -ds "$selected_name" -c "$selected"
fi

tmux switch-client -t "$selected_name"

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# tmux-cht.sh — ThePrimeagen-style cheat sheet lookup via cht.sh
# Opens in a tmux popup for quick reference

languages=$(echo "golang rust python bash typescript javascript lua terraform hcl yaml json dockerfile helm" | tr ' ' '\n')
core_utils=$(echo "find xargs sed awk grep curl jq git kubectl docker helm az tmux stow tar gzip" | tr ' ' '\n')

selected=$(printf '%s\n%s' "$languages" "$core_utils" | fzf --reverse --header "cht.sh — pick a topic")

if [[ -z $selected ]]; then
    exit 0
fi

read -p "Query: " query

if printf '%s' "$languages" | grep -qs "^${selected}$"; then
    query=$(echo "$query" | tr ' ' '+')
    tmux neww bash -c "curl -s cht.sh/${selected}/${query} | less -R"
else
    tmux neww bash -c "curl -s cht.sh/${selected}~${query} | less -R"
fi

input.old_string:
# display a message after toggling mouse support
bind m run "cut -c3- '#{TMUX_CONF}' | sh -s _toggle_mouse" \; display 'mouse #{?#{mouse},on,off}'

# move status line to top
#set -g status-position top
input.new_string:
# display a message after toggling mouse support
bind m run "cut -c3- '#{TMUX_CONF}' | sh -s _toggle_mouse" \; display 'mouse #{?#{mouse},on,off}'

# -- ThePrimeagen-style bindings -----------------------------------------------

# Sessionizer — fzf project picker, creates/switches sessions (prefix + f)
bind-key -r f run-shell "tmux neww tmux-sessionizer"

# Last session toggle — bounce between two sessions instantly (prefix + a)
bind-key a switch-client -l

# Cheat sheet lookup via cht.sh (prefix + i)
bind-key -r i run-shell "tmux neww tmux-cht.sh"

# Lazygit popup (prefix + g)
bind-key g display-popup -d '#{pane_current_path}' -w80% -h80% -E lazygit

# Quick terminal popup (prefix + T)
bind-key T display-popup -d '#{pane_current_path}' -w80% -h80%

# Vim-style pane navigation
bind-key h select-pane -L
bind-key j select-pane -D
bind-key k select-pane -U
bind-key l select-pane -R

# move status line to top
#set -g status-position top

input.old_string:
# to enable a plugin, use the 'set -g @plugin' syntax:
# visit https://github.com/tmux-plugins for available plugins
#set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-copycat'
#set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-cpu'
#set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-resurrect'
#set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-continuum'
#set -g @continuum-restore 'on'
input.new_string:
# -- plugins (lean Prime/Miessler-inspired set) --------------------------------
# Only essentials — no status bar eye candy, no monitoring, no sidebars

# Session persistence (Miessler's must-have)
set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-resurrect'
set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-continuum'
set -g @resurrect-strategy-nvim 'session'
set -g @resurrect-capture-pane-contents 'on'
set -g @continuum-restore 'on'
set -g @continuum-save-interval '15'

# Seamless vim/tmux navigation (Prime's essential)
set -g @plugin 'christoomey/vim-tmux-navigator'

# System clipboard integration
set -g @plugin 'tmux-plugins/tmux-yank'
set -g @yank_selection_mouse 'clipboard'

# FZF integration
set -g @plugin 'sainnhe/tmux-fzf'
